nasb.text: so that with one accord you may with one voice glorify the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ.

esv.text: that together you may with one voice glorify the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ.

cnv.text: 同心一致地榮耀我們主耶穌基督的父　神。

ccb.text: 使你们一起同声颂赞上帝——我们主耶稣基督的父。

csbs.text: 好使你们同心同声荣耀神——我们主耶稣基督的父。
